title: MIP Configuration Discovery Document
description: Schema for the /.well-known/mip-configuration endpoint response. This document describes the capabilities, endpoints, and supported profiles of a MIP implementation. Analogous to OpenID Connect Discovery (RFC 8414) but scoped to MIP-specific capabilities.

mip_version.description: The MIP protocol version supported by this implementation. MUST match the version in the served specification.

issuer.description: Base URL of this MIP deployment. MUST be an absolute HTTPS URI. All relative endpoint paths in this document are resolved against this base URL.

mip_configuration_endpoint.description: Canonical URL of this discovery document (self-referential). MUST be /.well-known/mip-configuration resolved against issuer.

supported_versions.description: All MIP protocol versions supported by this implementation. Used for version negotiation (see §21). Includes the current version and any backward-compatible prior versions.

implementation_classes.description: Which MIP implementation classes this deployment satisfies. Used for conformance declarations (see §20.3).

issuance_endpoint.description: Base URL for OID4VCI issuance operations. The /.well-known/openid-credential-issuer metadata endpoint is resolved relative to this URL.

openid_credential_issuer.description: Direct URL to the OID4VCI issuer metadata document (/.well-known/openid-credential-issuer). Present when implementation_classes includes ISSUER.

presentation_endpoint.description: Base URL for OID4VP verification operations. Present when implementation_classes includes VERIFIER.

token_endpoint.description: OAuth2 token endpoint for credential issuance flows.

authorization_endpoint.description: OAuth2 authorization endpoint for authorization_code issuance flows.

supported_credential_formats.description: Credential formats supported by this implementation.

supported_compliance_profiles.description: Compliance profile IDs or compliance_codes supported by this implementation.

supported_flow_types.description: Flow types supported at runtime by this implementation.

supported_signing_algorithms.description: Signing algorithms supported for credential issuance and holder binding proofs.

proximity_supported.description: Whether this implementation supports ISO 18013-5 proximity flows (BLE/NFC device engagement).

proximity_engagement_methods.description: Supported proximity engagement methods. Present only when proximity_supported is true.

scim_endpoint.description: Base URL for SCIM 2.0 organization and user management. Present when REGISTRY class is implemented.

revocation_endpoint.description: Base URL for revocation status list retrieval.

jwks_uri.description: URL to the JSON Web Key Set containing the implementation's public keys (for verifying issuer signatures, request objects, etc.).

org_endpoints.description: Per-organization endpoint overrides. Each entry provides scoped URLs for a specific organization.

service_documentation.description: URL to human-readable documentation for this MIP deployment.

policy_uri.description: URL to the privacy policy or acceptable use policy for this deployment.
